I will send the invoice and the paperwork right after we sign.

Milton, the deal is signed, congratulations. Could you walk me through the next steps?
Gladly. I will send the invoice and paperwork today, and we are shipping the first batch next Monday on the lead time we quoted.
Perfect. Our store opening is the milestone, so the shipment has to land a few days before.
Understood. And we are going to onboard your team that week, so they display and care for the pieces perfectly.
That is exactly what I hoped for. And after the deliverable arrives?
I will call you a week in for after-sales. If we fulfill every promise, I am confident we will retain you for years.
We are shipping the first deliverable on Monday, well before your milestone.
We are going to onboard your team, and I will handle after-sales myself to retain you.

Hi Milton, it is Karen from Halstead, just confirming the next steps after we signed. I am going to send the signed paperwork over to you this afternoon, and the invoice will follow by email tomorrow. On our side, the lead time you quoted works well, so we are expecting the first shipment in about three weeks. I will track it on our end, and I am going to flag any delay early so it does not surprise anyone. One small thing: our store opening is the big milestone for us, so as long as the deliverable lands a few days before, we are in great shape. I am really glad we settled this, and I think this is the start of something we are both going to be happy with. Talk soon.

Hey team, Milton here with a quick voice note now that the Halstead deal is signed. The hard part is over, but the work that keeps the client is just starting. First, I am going to send the invoice and the paperwork today, so nothing stalls. The lead time is three weeks, and we are shipping the first batch on schedule, so let us protect that date, because their store opening is the milestone that matters to them. After delivery, I want our after-sales to be flawless: I will call Karen myself a week in, and we are going to onboard her team on how to care for the pieces. If we fulfill every promise on this first order, we retain them for years, not one season. Long-term clients are the whole game, so let us treat the paperwork and the follow-up as seriously as we treated the deal. Thanks, everyone.
